name: Apple Raspberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Freeze the flour in a medium bowl for one (1) hour.
2. Refrigerate the lard for one (1) hour, then cut into cubes.
3. In a small cup, combine vinegar, salt, and water.
4. Measure 1 cup of flour on to the table, place lard cubes on top, and cover with the remaining flour.
5. Roll the rolling pin over the mixture until all pieces have been flattened and slightly incorporated.
6. Scrape into a bowl and mix with liquid.
7. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
8. With a lightly floured rolling pin, roll out a rectangle about 8 X 12 inches.
9. Fold to form an 8 inch square, then fold once more.
10. Wrap in parchment or waxed paper and refrigerate until needed.
11. Peel and core apples into eighths, then dice crosswise into 1 1/2-inch chunks.
12. Toss apples with lemon juice.
13. Blend together 1/2 cup sugar with the spices. Add apples and toss until evenly coated.
14. Add raspberries last and toss lightly.
15. Cut 1/3 of the dough and reserve.
16. Roll the remaining dough into a round about 5 inches larger than the dish, place it on top of the apples, and trim the overhang to one (1) inch.
17. Spoon in apples and distribute evenly.
18. Roll out the remaining shell, crimp.
19. Sprinkle the remaining sugar onto the crust.
20. Cut 5 slits in the center of the dough.
21. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, then lower the temperature to 400°F for 40 minutes, turning occasionally to brown evenly. Let cool.
